name: qol-skills
description: Claude Code skills for the qol-tools ecosystem (qol-tray host app, plugins, shared libs, CI workflows, and general engineering practices) — split into fine-grained plugins for per-plugin toggling.

plugins.name: qol-plugin-alt-tab
plugins.description: Skills for the qol-tray alt-tab plugin: GPUI window list, X11/macOS preview capture, daemon lifecycle, settings UI, and release flow.

plugins.name: qol-plugin-launcher
plugins.description: Skills for the qol-tray launcher plugin: GPUI launcher architecture, discovery/ranking, and release flow.

plugins.name: qol-plugin-pointz
plugins.description: Skills for the PointZ pair: qol-tray desktop server plugin and the Flutter mobile client (discovery, UDP transport, input injection).

plugins.name: qol-plugin-ide-checkout
plugins.description: Skills for the qol-tray ide-checkout (Task Runner) plugin: Rust supervisor + Python daemon internals and the task-runner HTTP API contract.

plugins.name: qol-plugin-keyremap
plugins.description: Skills for the qol-tray key remap plugin (macOS only): CGEventTap daemon, rule kinds, per-app exclusions, and rule editor UI.

plugins.name: qol-plugin-lights
plugins.description: Skills for the qol-tray lights plugin: Zigbee2MQTT backend adapter, daemon entrypoint, and auto-config settings UI.

plugins.name: qol-plugin-os-themes
plugins.description: Skills for the qol-tray OS themes plugin: shake-to-grow cursor effect, X11 cursor manipulation via xfixes, and the broader theming roadmap.

plugins.name: qol-plugin-screen-recorder
plugins.description: Skills for the qol-tray screen recorder plugin: ffmpeg recording flow and X11-based display capture.

plugins.name: qol-plugin-window-actions
plugins.description: Skills for the qol-tray window actions plugin: window minimize/restore and monitor movement.

plugins.name: qol-host
plugins.description: Host-app skills for qol-tray: core architecture, UI systems, dev logging, Profile feature, release flow, world canvas, and apps-testing conventions.

plugins.name: qol-dev-conventions
plugins.description: Cross-repo development conventions: rust, gpui, preact, qol-architecture, qol-shared-libs, qol-plugin-template, commit, git-push, git-trees, coding-general.

plugins.name: qol-ecosystem
plugins.description: Org- and workspace-level conventions: qol-tools repo layout and dependency model, plus qol-cicd reusable workflows.
